scored_papers.title: Canonical Uncertainty Relations for Madelung Variables in Curved Spacetime
scored_papers.abstract: We establish fundamental uncertainty relations for the hydrodynamic variables arising from the Madelung representation of quantum fields in curved spacetime. Through canonical quantization of the density n and phase theta variables and their conjugate momenta, we derive exact uncertainty principles that depend on spacetime geometry through the lapse function N and spatial metric gamma_ij. These relations reveal how gravitational fields modulate quantum fluctuations and provide first-principles constraints on quantum coherence in strong-gravity environments.
scored_papers.reason: 不確定性関係を重力場の流体力学変数で定式化🌟 時空幾何が量子揺らぎを変調する結果📐✨ 量子基礎＋gr-qcの直撃コンボ🔥
scored_papers.summary: 曲がった時空でMadelung変数(n,θ)を正準量子化→ラプス関数・空間計量に依存する不確定性関係を厳密導出🔭 量子コヒーレンスへの制約

scored_papers.title: Natural SUSY with mixed axion/axino dark matter
scored_papers.abstract: Supersymmetric models with PQ solution to the strong CP problem feature an axion-axino-saxion supermultiplet with micro-eV-scale axion and axino mass in keV-TeV range over 9 orders of magnitude, allowing mixed axion/axino dark matter.
scored_papers.reason: PQ対称性でSUSY＋アクシオンDMを統合🔮 micro-eVアクシオン＋keV〜TeVアクシーノの混合DM探索の系統的解析💪🌌
scored_papers.summary: 階層問題＋強いCP問題を同時解決するナチュラルSUSYでアクシオン/アクシーノ混合DM候補の質量範囲と宇宙論制限を調査⚡

scored_papers.title: Light neutrinos, Dark matter and leptogenesis near electroweak scale and Z_4 symmetry
scored_papers.abstract: Z_4 symmetry in Type I seesaw scenario reproduces neutrino mass-squared differences, mixings and CP violating phase within 3sigma using only three complex parameters and one real mass parameter for heavy right-handed neutrinos near electroweak scale.
scored_papers.reason: Z4対称性でニュートリノ質量・混合・CPV＋レプトジェネシス＋DM全部盛り🎯🌟 電弱スケールtype I seesawの最小パラメータ実装
scored_papers.summary: 3複素＋1実パラメータのみでニュートリノ振動データを3σ内で再現しバリオン数生成とDMも説明するZ4模型を構築✨
